recent_excerpts: Notion public pages expose the email addresses and profile photos of all editors, a flaw affecting millions of users of the collaboration platform.

Freelance platform Fiverr exposed sensitive user files, including tax documents and PII, via a misconfigured cloud storage bucket, with data indexed by Google search, according to security researchers

Microsoft and Salesforce have patched critical prompt injection vulnerabilities in their AI agent platforms—Copilot Studio and Agentforce—that could have allowed external attackers to exfiltrate sensi
